title: Add QR code generation from UPI ID

requirements.text: Generate a QR code from the UPI ID that the user will provide, and display it in the application interface

quotes: can you add a qr code out of the upi id which ill sent you now??

acceptanceCriteria: QR code is generated from the UPI payment string format
QR code is scannable and initiates UPI payment with correct details
QR code is displayed in a user-accessible location in the UI

requirements.text: Use the UPI_ID constant from frontend/src/config/constants.ts as the payment identifier for QR code generation
acceptanceCriteria: QR code uses the existing UPI_ID configuration value
Payment amount calculation includes the 10% platform fee as per existing implementation

constraints: Use existing UPI_ID constant from frontend/src/config/constants.ts
Maintain consistency with existing payment flow and fee calculation
nonGoals: Changing the UPI ID value or configuration structure
Adding new payment methods beyond UPI
